uplink.description: Status report: temp 23.45C, humidity 56.78%, battery 3.0V, shock alarm
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds status frame; wire layout cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature 23.45, Humidity 56.78, Volt 3, ShockTamperAlarm Alarm). expected.data authored to the normalized vocabulary.

uplink.description: Status report: low battery 2.5V, temp -1.0C, humidity 15.0%, low temp+humidity alarms, no shock
uplink._note: Synthetic frame exercising low-battery flag (byte4 high bit set, 0x99 -> 2.5V), negative two's-complement temperature (0xFF9C -> -1.00C) and threshold alarm bits; cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.
reportType byte3 == 0x00 is a version/datecode frame with no measurement.

uplink.description: Config response fPort 23 is not a data report
uplink._note: Config/command responses arrive on fPort 23 and carry no normalized measurement.
